title: Testing, Debugging, and Quality Evidence · Program Brief: Python Integration Tests
summary: Verify the command-line data tool across pure logic, filesystem boundaries, failures, and changed inputs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python integration tests increment in a tested data-report release candidate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test filesystem, process, serialization, and package boundaries with controlled temporary environments.
Choose fakes, stubs, spies, and mocks at external boundaries without asserting private call choreography unnecessarily.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
